title: Why was the Ambassador particularly lucky?

meanings.usage: 形容脸色不好或因恐惧、疾病导致的面色发白
形容非常糟糕、令人不悦的状况
指派人到某地工作（常用被动语态）
形容射击、描述等非常精准
修饰整个句子，表示好运
指火灾、战争、疾病等突然发生
物体突然破裂释放能量
指因意外而受到的惊吓

examples.en: She got a shock when she saw the damage.
examples.zh: 看到损坏程度，她吃了一惊。

examples.en: The wife got a shock when her husband returned home.
examples.zh: 丈夫回家时，妻子吃了一惊。

phrases.usage: 状况糟糕；处于可怕的状态

examples.en: His clothes were in a frightful state.
examples.zh: 他的衣服状况很糟糕。

examples.en: The room was in a frightful state after the party.
examples.zh: 聚会后房间一团糟。

examples.en: Students set the Embassy on fire this morning.
examples.zh: 今天早上学生们放火烧了大使馆。

examples.en: Someone set the car on fire last night.
examples.zh: 昨晚有人放火烧了那辆车。

examples.en: The fire broke out in the basement.
examples.zh: 火灾在地下室突然发生。

examples.en: World War II broke out in 1939.
examples.zh: 第二次世界大战在1939年爆发。

examples.en: I went down immediately to the basement.
examples.zh: 我立刻下楼去了地下室。

examples.en: She went down to the first floor.
examples.zh: 她下到一楼去了。

examples.en: Where were you at the time?
examples.zh: 当时你在哪里？

examples.en: I was in my office at the time.
examples.zh: 那时我在我的办公室。

examples.en: Good heavens! What has happened?
examples.zh: 天哪！发生什么事了？

examples.en: Good heavens! Look at the time!
examples.zh: 天哪！看看几点了！

examples.en: She noticed a big hole in her husband's hat.
examples.zh: 她注意到丈夫帽子上有一个大洞。

examples.en: I noticed a hole in my sock.
examples.zh: 我注意到袜子上有一个洞。

examples.en: Someone fired a shot through my office window.
examples.zh: 有人朝我的办公室窗户开了一枪。

examples.en: The police fired a shot into the air.
examples.zh: 警察朝天鸣枪。

phrases.phrase: If I had been... I would not have been able to...
phrases.usage: 与过去事实相反的虚拟语气

examples.en: If I had been wearing it, I would not have been able to get home for lunch.
examples.zh: 如果我当时戴着它，就不能回家吃午饭了。

examples.en: If I had known, I would not have come.
examples.zh: 如果我早知道，我就不会来了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 + when + 一般过去时 (Past Continuous + when + Past Simple)
grammar.definition: 过去进行时表示正在进行的动作，when引导的一般过去时表示突然发生的另一个动作。这个结构用于描述一个持续的动作被另一个短暂的动作打断。
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式
grammar.usage: 当一个正在进行的动作被另一个突然发生的动作打断时使用。when后的动作通常用一般过去时，表示意外或突然发生的事件。

examples.en: I was walking down the street when it started to rain.
examples.zh: 我正在街上走，突然开始下雨了。

examples.en: The fire broke out in the basement. I was in my office as usual when it happened.
examples.zh: 火灾在地下室爆发。当时我像往常一样在办公室里。

examples.en: She was cooking dinner when the phone rang.
examples.zh: 她正在做饭，突然电话响了。

grammar.title: 过去虚拟语气 (Third Conditional / Past Unreal Conditional)
grammar.definition: 表示与过去事实完全相反的情况，假设一种不可能发生的事。结构上使用if + had + 过去分词，主句使用 would have + 过去分词。
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + had + 过去分词..., 主语 + would have + 过去分词...
grammar.usage: 用于谈论与过去事实相反的假设情况，表达后悔、遗憾或想象。

examples.en: If I had been wearing it, I would not have been able to get home for lunch.
examples.zh: 如果我当时戴着它，就不能回家吃午饭了。（实际上没戴，所以能回家）

examples.en: If I had studied harder, I would have passed the exam.
examples.zh: 如果我当时学习更努力些，就能通过考试了。（实际上没努力，所以没通过）

examples.en: If he had arrived earlier, he would have caught the train.
examples.zh: 如果他早点到，就能赶上火车了。（实际上迟到，没赶上）

grammar.title: 间接问句 (Indirect Questions)
grammar.definition: 将一般疑问句或特殊疑问句转换为由whether/if或疑问词引导的陈述句语序结构，常用于礼貌询问或嵌入主句中。
grammar.structure: 主句 + whether/if/疑问词 + 主语 + 动词...
grammar.usage: 在问句前有主句动词（如asked, wondered, wanted to know等）时使用，使语气更委婉或作为从句。

examples.en: She asked where I was at the time.
examples.zh: 她问我当时在哪里。

examples.en: He wanted to know what had happened.
examples.zh: 他想知道发生了什么事。

examples.en: I wondered if she was coming.
examples.zh: 我想知道她是否会来。

imitations.en: What has happened to your car?

sentencePatterns.pattern: How did + 主语 + get + into such a... ?

original.en: How did your clothes get into such a mess?
original.zh: 你的衣服怎么弄得这么一团糟？

imitations.en: How did your room get into such a state?
imitations.zh: 你的房间怎么弄得这么乱？

imitations.en: How did he get into such a difficult situation?
imitations.zh: 他怎么陷入这样的困境？

imitations.en: How did your hair get into such a mess?
imitations.zh: 你的头发怎么弄得这么乱？

sentencePatterns.pattern: Where were you + at the time?

original.en: Where were you at the time?

imitations.en: Where were you at the time of the accident?
Where were you at the time of the robbery?
Where was she at the time?

sentencePatterns.pattern: If I had been..., I would not have been able to...

original.en: If I had been, I would not have been able to get home for lunch.
original.zh: 如果我（戴帽子）了，就不能回家吃午饭了。

imitations.en: If I had been there, I would have helped you.
imitations.zh: 如果我当时在场，就能帮你了。

imitations.en: If I had studied harder, I would have passed the exam.
imitations.zh: 如果我学习更努力，就能通过考试了。

imitations.en: If I had known about the traffic, I would not have been late.
imitations.zh: 如果我知道交通情况，就不会迟到了。
